generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former FEMA director, I've seen firsthand how vital civil defense preparedness is for national security. Communities with robust emergency plans respond 40% faster to crises. Don't let bureaucrats cut funding for local preparedness—it's not just about saving lives, it's about maintaining our deterrence edge. #NationalSecurityFirst
